data.title: Indian central bank front-loads rate cut to boost growth amid global volatility
data.description:
Indian stocks rallied on Friday after the central bank delivered a bigger-than-expected interest rate cut, as it front-loaded policy easing to support domestic growth in the "fragile and highly fluid" global backdrop.  

The Reserve Bank of India lowered its policy repo rate by 50 basis points to 5.5%, the lowest level since 2022 and its third consecutive cut. Following the decision, the benchmark Nifty 50 (NIFTY) logged its best trading session in three weeks to end 1% higher. BSE Sensex (SENSEX) closed up 0.9%.

At a press conference, RBI Governor Sanjay Malhotra said "front-loading" rate cuts was needed to support economic growth, given heightened global uncertainty.

"Strong macroeconomic fundamentals and benign inflation outlook provide space for monetary policy to support growth, while remaining consistent with the goal of price stability," he said. "Today's policy action should be seen as a step towards propelling growth to a higher aspirational trajectory."

Malhotra added that after cutting rates by 100 bps since February 2025, the RBI has changed its stance from accommodative to neutral. It will assess incoming data and the evolving outlook to chart out future policy.

"The RBI is signalling a pause, but it's leaving the door open for more easing if growth or inflation weakens further," said Deepali Bhargava, chief economist - Asia-Pacific at ING. "… with real policy rates still sitting well above historical norms, we continue to expect one 25 bp rate cut later this year, likely in Q4."

The RBI's policy decision echoes recent moves by central banks in China, South Korea and Indonesia to stimulate domestic growth amid global uncertainty.

data.title: Vera plunges as Otsuka outperforms with IgA nephropathy therapy
data.description:
Vera Therapeutics (NASDAQ:VERA) fell ~32% in the premarket on Friday after late-stage trial data indicated that the company’s lead asset, atacicept, targeted at a kidney disorder called immunoglobulin A nephropathy failed to outperform a rival product from Otsuka Pharmaceutical (OTCPK:OTSKY).

The selloff came after Otsuka, a unit of Otsuka Holdings (OTCPK:OTSKY), presented interim data from a late-stage trial involving nearly 510 adults with IgA nephropathy at a European medical event to support its rival therapy, sibeprenlimab.

Citing nine-month data in its Phase 3 VISIONARY study, Otsuka said that sibeprenlimab led to a 51.2% (P<0.0001) decline in proteinuria, an endpoint used in IgAN clinical trials to support accelerated regulatory approvals.

The effect measured using 24-hour uPCR (urine protein-to-creatinine ratio) and related to the study's main goal was statistically significant and clinically meaningful, the company added.

While ~76% of patients on sibeprenlimab experienced treatment-emergent adverse events compared to ~85% in the placebo arm, the experimental treatment indicated a safety profile consistent with prior data, Otsuka (OTCPK:OTSKY) noted.

The company’s Biologics License Application targeting U.S. marketing approval of sibeprenlimab for IgA nephropathy is currently under FDA priority review with a target action date of Nov. 28, 2025.

On Monday, Vera (NASDAQ:VERA) announced that its IgAN therapy met the primary endpoint in its ORIGIN Phase 3 trial, demonstrating a statistically significant 42% reduction in proteinuria compared to placebo at week 36.

data.title: Wynn Resorts enters the UK gaming market with a casino in London
data.description:
Wynn Resorts Limited (NASDAQ:WYNN) announced that it completed the purchase of Wynn Mayfair from Crown Resorts after landing the required approval from the UK Gaming Commission. Notably, the prestigious Mayfair casino location expands Wynn's (NASDAQ:WYNN) footprint in Europe and the Middle East ahead of Wynn Al Marjan Island resort opening in the UAE in early 2027.

Wynn Mayfair spans two historic townhouses at 27-28 Curzon Street in London. The location is considered one of the most exclusive gaming and dining experiences in the region. For more than half a century, London's brightest stars, royals, and the society set have flocked to the private members-only club.

The club presents various gaming options with twenty gaming tables distributed across the main gaming floor, rooftop terrace, and six opulent salons privé. The club also contains an impressive collection of antiques, plush furnishings, and both classical and contemporary works by photographers and artists. 

The casino company thinks the acquisition of the iconic asset will give it a presence in a global gateway city, as well as creating a conduit for guests to visit other resorts, particularly Wynn Al Marjan Island which is slated to open in the first quarter of 2027 in Ras Al Khaimah in the United Arab Emirates.

CBRE Equity Research analyst John DeCree highlighted that the deal could be a valuable customer acquisition tool for Wynn Resorts (WYNN). He noted that Aspinalls probably does not generate much cash flow, but sees the casino pickup as a strategic purchase. "Aspinalls caters to very high-end VIP gaming customers from London but also internationally, including from Asia, India, and the Middle East, making it a very unique customer acquisition tool for Wynn Al Marjan Island," he stated. DeCree highlighted that Aspinalls hosts a regular Bollywood Night, and India is one of the top feeder markets for tourism to the UAE.

"This acquisition gives WYNN a flag in a gateway city that should help build the global database and boost Wynn's brand power in the region ahead of a blockbuster opening in the UAE. Importantly, this is a high-end gaming asset with high-intent customers, making it a more deliberate customer acquisition channel relative to a branded hotel strategy or partnership."

Shares of Wynn Resorts (WYNN) traded flat at $83.25 in the premarket session.

data.title: Everbright Digital files to sell 7M ordinary shares for holders
data.description:
• Everbright Digital (NASDAQ:EDHL) filed to sell 7M ordinary shares to holders.
  • On June 5, the closing price of the company's ordinary shares was $4.5300 per share.

data.title: Shift4 further extends tender offer to acquire Global Blue
data.description:
Shift4 Payments (NYSE:FOUR) on Friday said that it was further extending its previously announced all-cash tender offer through its indirect wholly owned subsidiary, GT Holding 1 GmbH, a Swiss limited liability company, to purchase all the outstanding shares of Global Blue Group (NYSE:GB).

FOUR agreed to buy tax-free shopping platform Global Blue for $7.50 per share in cash and a roughly $2.5B enterprise value in February.

The tender offer is subject to certain conditions, including, among other things, satisfaction of a minimum tender condition, for which the 90% threshold has been met, the receipt of regulatory approvals in certain jurisdictions, and other customary closing conditions. 

The transaction is expected to close by the third quarter of calendar year 2025.

Global Blue’s (NYSE:GB) board of directors has unanimously recommended that all shareholders tender their shares into the offer.  

Source: Press Release

data.title: Codere Online regains compliance with Nasdaq listing requirements
data.description:
• Codere Online Luxembourg (NASDAQ:CDRO) has received formal notification from the Nasdaq Stock Market confirming that the company has regained compliance with the Nasdaq Listing Rule.
  • As a result, the company’s securities will continue to be listed and traded on the Nasdaq Capital Market and are no longer subject to a delisting process.

data.title: QuantaSing Group reports Q3 results
data.description:
• QuantaSing Group press release (NASDAQ:QSG): Q3 Revenues were RMB570.7 million (US$78.6 million), representing a decrease of 21.5% from the second quarter of the fiscal year ending June 30, 2025 and a decrease of 39.6% from the third quarter of the fiscal year ended June 30, 2024.
  • Gross billings of individual online learning services for the third quarter of FY 2025 were RMB515.6 million (US$71.0 million), representing a decrease of 5.6% from the second quarter of FY 2025 and a decrease of 47.5% from the third quarter of FY 2024.
  • Adjusted net income for the third quarter of FY 2025 was RMB37.8 million (US$5.2 million), representing a decrease of 71.3% from the second quarter of FY 2025 and an increase of 18.5% from the third quarter of FY 2024.
  • Total registered users increased by 19.9% to approximately 145.0 million as of March 31, 2025, from 121.0 million as of March 31, 2024.
  • Paying learners was approximately 0.3 million in the third quarter of FY 2025.
  • EPS of $0.03.

data.title: Gold climbs despite stronger dollar, oil heads for weekly gain as U.S.-China trade talks resume
data.description:
Gold and other precious metals rose on Friday despite a stronger U.S. dollar (DXY), while oil prices slipped but were on track for their first weekly gain in three weeks after President Donald Trump and Chinese leader Xi Jinping resumed trade talks.

Spot gold (XAUUSD:CUR) headed for a 2.5% weekly rise, with silver (XAGUSD:CUR) up over 9% this week. 

"I remain bullish on gold, expecting a move to $4,000/lb driven by central bank demand and heightened economic policy uncertainty," Absolute Return Partners, a London-based investment advisory said. 

"Gold mining stocks have lagged bullion, but the gap should close, offering potential outperformance as gold prices rise further," the note added.

Oil prices, meanwhile, were on track to settle higher after falling for two straight weeks. Brent has advanced nearly 4% this week, while WTI is trading 4% higher.

China's official Xinhua news agency said trade talks between Xi and Trump took place at Washington's request. Trump said the call had led to a "very positive conclusion," adding the U.S. was "in very good shape with China and the trade deal."

"Despite the rise in supply of 411,000b/d for July from OPEC+ to reduce voluntary cuts for the eight members, near-term fundamentals remain balanced, though slower economic growth later in the year will see markets tip into oversupply," Fitch's BMI Research said.

"Looking ahead to next month’s OPEC meeting, we expect another rise in output of 411,000b/d for August should market conditions and prices remain steady."

In a positive sign for prices, US oil inventories this week registered significant declines, indicating demand for oil remains strong.

"The potential for increased US sanctions in Venezuela to limit crude exports and the potential for Israeli strike on Iranian infrastructure add to upside risks for prices. But both weaker demand for oil and increased production from both OPEC+ and non-OPEC producers will add to downside price pressures in the coming quarters," the brokerage added.

data.title: U.S. Treasury department adds Ireland, Switzerland to monitoring list, warns China
data.description:
The U.S. Department of the Treasury added Ireland and Switzerland to its "monitoring list" of countries warranting close attention, expanding the list to nine in its semiannual report.

Other countries on the list include China, Japan, South Korea, Taiwan, Vietnam, Germany, and Singapore for extra foreign exchange scrutiny.

The department automatically adds to the monitoring list if countries meet at least two of the give criteria: a trade surplus with the US of at least $15 billion, a global current account surplus exceeding 3% of GDP, and persistent, one-way net foreign exchange purchases.

The Treasury Department concluded that no major U.S. trading partner manipulated its currency in 2024. This continues the trend from the previous administration, with no currency manipulation findings throughout Joe Biden’s four-year term.

Though China is not designated as a currency manipulator amid "RMB depreciation pressure," the Treasury issued a stern warning to China, stating that it "stands out among our major trading partners in its lack of transparency around its exchange rate policies and practices."

“This lack of transparency will not preclude Treasury from designating China if available evidence suggests that it is intervening through formal or informal channels to resist RMB appreciation in the future.” the department added.

Dear readers: We recognize that politics often intersects with the financial news of the day, so we invite you to click here to join the separate political discussion.

data.title: Patriot National Bancorp raises $10M in direct stock offering
data.description:
• Patriot National Bancorp (NASDAQ:PNBK) completed a registered direct offering of ~8.52M shares of its common stock at a purchase price of $1.25 per share.
  • Gross proceeds expected of ~$10.65M.
  • The registered direct offering follows a private placement that raised over $50M in gross proceeds from a diverse group of accredited investors.
  • The stock price traded 3.3% higher on Thursday during after-market hours of trading.
